mapper.sql: trace_id, session_id, user_id, raw_input, intent, confidence, plan_stage, triggered_skill, parameter_summary, prompt_version, spring_ai_used, fallback_used, final_reply, elapsed_millis, status, failure_type, step_json, reasoning_json, input_tokens, output_tokens, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_trace_record ( trace_id, session_id, user_id, raw_input, intent, confidence, plan_stage, triggered_skill, parameter_summary, prompt_version, spring_ai_used, fallback_used, final_reply, elapsed_millis, status, failure_type, step_json, reasoning_json, input_tokens, output_tokens, created_at ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{rawInput}, #{intent}, #{confidence}, #{planStage}, #{triggeredSkill}, #{parameterSummary}, #{promptVersion}, #{springAiUsed}, #{fallbackUsed}, #{finalReply}, #{elapsedMillis}, #{status}, #{failureType}, #{stepJson}, #{reasoningJson}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agent_trace_record WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
